description: An agency employee reports that they may have accidentally exposed citizen data, triggering a data breach response.

nodes.task_description: Receive the initial report of the potential breach from the employee.

expected_outcome.expected: The IT security officer documents the initial report.

nodes.task_description: Immediately launch an investigation to determine the scope of the breach: what data was exposed and how many citizens are affected.

expected_outcome.expected: The security team begins a forensic investigation.

nodes.task_description: Notify the agency's leadership and legal counsel of the incident.

expected_outcome.expected: The security officer escalates the incident to the appropriate leadership.
